case_title: CACH LLC VS. RALPH M. TAYLOR et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC SERVED APR-28-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, RALPH M.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, RALPH M.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAYLOR, RALPH M. $10,168.35 PRINCIPAL, $1,350.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $379.44 INTEREST, $430.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,327.79, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $430.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, RALPH M.
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, RALPH M. DOES 1 THRU 10 INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-12-2012
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10 INCL.
